description: VIE non-disclosure (2021–2024) + BDO audit silence (2022–2024) = escalating scienter pattern. Each year of non-disclosure strengthens the inference of intentional concealment.
litigation_text: The temporal alignment of DraftKings' VIE non-disclosure with BDO's continuing audit opinion constitutes a pattern suggesting coordinated concealment under PCAOB AS 2201.
